import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import"./LeaveAdmin.css";// same styles
import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function EmployeeLeaveHistory(){const[requests,setRequests]=useState([]);const loggedInUser=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("loggedInUser"));const token=localStorage.getItem("token");useEffect(()=>{if(!loggedInUser||!token)return;fetch("http://localhost:8080/api/leaves/employee/".concat(loggedInUser.email),{method:"GET",headers:{"Authorization":"Bearer ".concat(token),"Content-Type":"application/json"}}).then(response=>{if(!response.ok)throw new Error("Failed to fetch leave history");return response.json();}).then(data=>{setRequests(data);}).catch(error=>{console.error("Error:",error);alert("Could not load leave history");});},[loggedInUser,token]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"leave-admin-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"My Leave History"}),requests.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"no-requests",children:"No Leave Applications Found"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"leave-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Leave Type"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"From"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"To"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Reason"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Applied"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Status"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:requests.map(req=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.leaveType}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.startDate}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.endDate}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.reason}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:req.appliedDate?req.appliedDate.substring(0,10):"-"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{color:req.status==="Approved"?"green":req.status==="Rejected"?"red":"#ff9800",fontWeight:"bold"},children:req.status})})]},req.id))})]})]});}export default EmployeeLeaveHistory;
